true_desc_levels.1:
(Passive Effect) At the start of battle, inflicts irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the fastest enemy for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)
Additionally, grants <color=#28d9ed>Pureblood's Domain</color> to all allies.

Allies' Bleeding DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.

(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies and with a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)

(パッシブ効果) 戦闘開始時、最もスピードが速い敵単体に解除されない<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。（効果抵抗無視）
さらに味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>【鮮血の領域】</color>を付与する。

味方の出血ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr:
(패시브 효과) 전투 시작 시 속도가 가장 빠른 적 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 해제되지 않는 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다. (효과 저항 무시)
추가로 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>선혈의 영역</color>을 부여합니다.

아군의 출혈 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.

(액티브 효과) 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다. (효과 저항 무시)

SKT_BURST_1.effect: Increases damage\nInflicts 1 additional stack of Bleeding (Ignores Resilience)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: ダメージUP\n出血1個追加発生 (効果抵抗無視)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_kr: 피해 증가\n출혈 1개 추가 발생 (효과 저항 무시)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 伤害提升\n额外触发1次出血 (无视效果抵抗)

SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 強化攻撃に変更\nダメージUP
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 替换为强化攻击\n伤害提升

true_desc_levels.1: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies and attacks all enemies. If the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. After using the skill, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)
true_desc_levels.2: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies and attacks all enemies. If the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. After using the skill, decreases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)

true_desc_levels.1_jp: スキル使用時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPし、スキル使用後<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。（効果抵抗無視）

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 스킬 사용 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가하고 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다. (효과 저항 무시)
